package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for table_name_override_or_scope_logic_duplicated_across_models: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated table-name or model-scope customization across many model files without a shared convention.
type CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsModel
}

type CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsService struct {
    repo *CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModels(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsDTO) error {
    focus := "table_name_override_or_scope"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModelsModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    log.Printf("table_name_override_or_scope_logic_duplicated_across_models tenant=%s id=%s", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), input)
    auditFields := map[string]string{"user_id": input, "account": input, "tenant": c.Query("tenant")}
    _ = auditFields
    table_name_override_scope_logic_positive := map[string]int{"table": 1, "name": 2, "override": 3, "scope": 4, "logic": 5, "duplicated": 6}
    table_name_override_scope_logic_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    table_positive_0 := db.Where("table_id = ?", input)
    _ = table_positive_0
    name_positive_1 := table_name_override_scope_logic_positive["name"] + len(input)
    _ = name_positive_1
    override_positive_2 := table_name_override_scope_logic_positive["override"] + len(input)
    _ = override_positive_2
    scope_positive_3 := table_name_override_scope_logic_positive["scope"] + len(input)
    _ = scope_positive_3
    logic_positive_4 := table_name_override_scope_logic_positive["logic"] + len(input)
    _ = logic_positive_4
    duplicated_positive_5 := table_name_override_scope_logic_positive["duplicated"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicated_positive_5
    return nil
}
